input_notes: e2e-test-data-plan.md was created in Phase 5B as a structural pointer extracting data-setup content from e2e-plan.md and e2e-codegen-plan.md, to satisfy the reviewer Context Contract. No new factual claims introduced.
m4-review-summary.md is a verbatim copy of m3-stage2-review-summary.md (same change, same content) — content is current.

All Phase 6.5 prerequisites are shipped: tests/e2e/scripts/menu_data_setup.py, tests/e2e/conftest.py extensions, and .aws/data-knowledge.yaml refresh are present and pytest-collectable. BL-E2E-001 is historical.

findings.message: delete_menu helper uses bare 'except Exception: return' which silently swallows real connectivity, auth, and timeout failures during cleanup. Hidden cleanup failures lead to flaky later runs (qa-test-* leftovers persist) without any signal to the operator.
findings.suggestion: Replace bare except with targeted handling: catch httpx.HTTPError + httpx.TimeoutException explicitly, and emit warnings.warn(...) before returning. Keep idempotency for 404 + non-200 biz code, but fail loud for unknown exceptions.

findings.message: TC-MENU-E2E-002 does not assert the menu_type RadioGroup is hidden when entering the 子菜单 modal (showMenuType=false invariant per index.vue:162). The plan claims this invariant in e2e-plan.md but the codegen plan body skips the assertion.
findings.suggestion: Add an assertion in TC-MENU-E2E-002 after _open_child_add_modal: expect(page.get_by_role("dialog").get_by_role("radio", name="目录")).not_to_be_visible() — or verify the RadioGroup container is absent.

findings.message: TC-MENU-E2E-001 default-radio assertion uses to_be_checked() on a NaiveUI NRadio component. Some NaiveUI versions render NRadio as a div with role='radio' and aria-checked='true' instead of an HTML <input>. to_be_checked() may not match in those cases.
findings.suggestion: Either add a fallback assertion using to_have_attribute('aria-checked', 'true'), or use a more permissive role check (e.g., expect(...).to_be_visible() plus visible-state inspection of the parent .n-radio--checked class). Codegen should choose the form that matches the bundled NaiveUI version.

findings.message: Module header imports httpx but the test file body delegates all HTTP to menu_data_setup helpers. Codegen should not emit an unused import — it produces flake8/ruff F401 noise.
findings.suggestion: Drop 'import httpx' from the test module header. Helpers handle httpx internally.

findings.message: m4-review-summary.md (copied from m3-stage2-review-summary.md) still says 'Phase 5B — aws-e2e-plan-reviewer inline review → review/plan-review.json' as a 'Next Phase'. After this Phase 5B review, the file is informational only — keep as-is or refresh on archive.
findings.suggestion: No action required pre-codegen. Phase 11 archive can normalize the wording if desired.

warnings_carried_to_codegen: F-E2E-001: delete_menu must emit warnings on unknown exceptions (do not silently swallow).
F-E2E-002: TC-MENU-E2E-002 should add an explicit assertion that menu_type RadioGroup is hidden in 子菜单 modal.
F-E2E-003: Default-radio assertion may need aria-checked fallback for NaiveUI NRadio.
F-E2E-004: Codegen MUST NOT emit unused 'import httpx' in test module.
